C

calculateExpiredDate(StoreProduct) - Method in class order.Cart
It calculates the expired date of the product
calculateExpiredDatePacks(Pack) - Method in class order.Cart
It calculates the expired date of the packs
calculatePrice() - Method in class order.Cart
It calculates the price of the cart
CANCELED - Enum constant in enum class exchange.OfferStatus
The offer was cancelled by the sender
cancelOffer() - Method in class exchange.Offer
It allows a client to cancel an offer they made
cancelPack(Pack) - Method in class order.Cart
It cancels a pack in the cart
cancelProduct(StoreProduct) - Method in class order.Cart
It cancels a product in the cart
CARDS - Enum constant in enum class product.GameStyle
Cards game style
Cart - Class in order
Cart, array of products and packs the user has not paid yet
Cart() - Constructor for class order.Cart
Creates a cart with default modification date (today)
Cart(boolean, LocalDate) - Constructor for class order.Cart
Creates a new cart without content
Cart(List<StoreProduct>, List<Pack>, boolean, LocalDate) - Constructor for class order.Cart
Creates a new cart

It allows the manager to see the store's categories by revenue

Instantiates a new Category discount factory

It changes the store's address
changeDate(LocalDateTime) - Method in class exchange.Exchange
Changes the date of the exchange
changeExchanged(boolean) - Method in class exchange.Exchange
Changes if the exchange was done
changeExchangeTime(Period) - Method in class store.Parameter
Changes the time it will pass since the offer is accepted and the exchange is done

Changes the interest in a specific notification type

It changes the number of lines that can be printed from a certain list

It changes the score a param (scoreWeight = a*score + b)

It changes the score b param (weightedScore = a*score + b)
changeScoreBParam(double) - Method in class user.Manager
It changes the score b param (weightedScore = a*score + b)

Changes the order of the search (ascendant or descendant)

Change the valuation cost
changeValuationCost(double) - Method in class user.Manager

It checks if the discount is no longer active
checkExpiration() - Method in class exchange.Offer
It checks if the offer has surpassed the maximum amount of time an offer can be active for

It removes the products and packs that have expired

It allows the manager to see the store's registered clients by number of exchanges
clientsByOrders() - Method in class main.ManagerLoop
It allows the manager to see the store's registered clients by number of orders
